human_label: Any general danger sign is present
threshold_expression: ex_convulsions == true OR ex_not_able_to_drink_or_feed == true OR ex_vomits_everything == true OR ex_unusually_sleepy_or_unconscious == true

human_label: Child has fast breathing for age
threshold_expression: (demo_age_months >= 2 AND demo_age_months < 12 AND v_respiratory_rate_per_min >= 50) OR (demo_age_months >= 12 AND demo_age_months <= 59 AND v_respiratory_rate_per_min >= 40)

human_label: Cough with fast breathing (pneumonia) without chest indrawing
threshold_expression: q_cough == true AND p_fast_breathing == true AND ex_chest_indrawing == false

human_label: Cough or cold with no fast breathing (no pneumonia)
threshold_expression: q_cough == true AND p_fast_breathing == false AND ex_chest_indrawing == false

human_label: Fever with negative RDT (fever, no malaria)
Severe acute malnutrition (MUAC < 115 mm or oedema of both feet)

threshold_expression: v_muac_mm >= 115 AND v_muac_mm < 125 AND ex_oedema_both_feet == false
